action.reasoning: Observation: Training completed in ~80 seconds for 30 epochs, best Val MAE = 0.1950 at epoch 27. Analysis: Fingerprint + MLP approach works, but MAE is moderate (~0.2). Need test MAE baseline before optimizing further. Decision: Submit eval with best checkpoint to get primary metric (test MAE) and measure iteration time. Then plan improvements (more epochs, hyperparameter tuning, additional fingerprint types).
